mapper.select: SELECT tb_schedule.*, tb_user.nick_name, tb_meeting.meeting_name AS meetingRoomName FROM tb_schedule LEFT JOIN tb_user ON tb_schedule.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_meeting ON tb_schedule.meeting_room_id = tb_meeting.id AND tb_meeting.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_schedule.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_schedule.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT tb_schedule.*, tb_user.nick_name, tb_meeting.meeting_name AS meetingRoomName FROM tb_schedule LEFT JOIN tb_user ON tb_schedule.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_meeting ON tb_schedule.meeting_room_id = tb_meeting.id AND tb_meeting.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_schedule.is_deleted = 0 AND (tb_schedule.user_id = #{userId} OR (tb_schedule.is_public = 1 AND tb_schedule.schedule_type = 2) OR tb_schedule.id IN (SELECT sp.schedule_id FROM tb_schedule_participant sp WHERE sp.user_id = #{userId} AND sp.is_deleted = 0)) AND tb_schedule.start_time < #{endTime} AND tb_schedule.end_time > #{startTime} ORDER BY tb_schedule.start_time ASC

SELECT tb_schedule.*, tb_user.nick_name, tb_meeting.meeting_name AS meetingRoomName FROM tb_schedule LEFT JOIN tb_user ON tb_schedule.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_meeting ON tb_schedule.meeting_room_id = tb_meeting.id AND tb_meeting.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_schedule.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_schedule.user_id = #{userId} AND tb_schedule.remind_type > 0 AND tb_schedule.start_time >= CURDATE() AND tb_schedule.start_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY tb_schedule.start_time ASC

SELECT tb_schedule.*, tb_user.nick_name, tb_meeting.meeting_name AS meetingRoomName FROM tb_schedule LEFT JOIN tb_user ON tb_schedule.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_meeting ON tb_schedule.meeting_room_id = tb_meeting.id AND tb_meeting.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_schedule.is_deleted = 0 AND (tb_schedule.user_id = #{userId} OR tb_schedule.id IN (SELECT sp.schedule_id FROM tb_schedule_participant sp WHERE sp.user_id = #{userId} AND sp.is_deleted = 0)) AND tb_schedule.start_time >= NOW() ORDER BY tb_schedule.start_time ASC LIMIT 5
